rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'components' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/components/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The entity 'components' is either introduced as a module under src/modules/components/ or removed from the domain model.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to existing modules other than the potential introduction of the 'components' module
Modifications to unrelated domains or modules

ambiguities.description: Whether to introduce the 'components' module or remove the entity from the domain model.
